choice: E*TRADE access is interactive user-present OAuth only in v1 (manual sync button + sync-on-open); production consumer key application starts immediately and development uses the sandbox key; until the production key arrives, balances come from manual entry and CSV import of E*TRADE website exports. Background end-of-day sync is deferred post-v1. Secrets: consumer key/secret in Railway env vars, OAuth tokens encrypted at rest in Postgres, API usage strictly read-only.
rationale: No production key yet; user chose interactive OAuth with the bridge and parked background sync
